faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know to get started with Keychain.
faq.whatIs.question: What is Keychain?
faq.whatIs.answer: Keychain is a self-custody Web3 wallet that helps you manage assets, connect to dApps, and approve transactions across mobile and browser extension.
faq.selfCustody.question: Is Keychain self-custody?
faq.selfCustody.answer: Yes. Keychain is built for self-custody, so you keep control of your keys and approve actions directly from your wallet.
faq.networks.question: Which networks does Keychain support?
faq.networks.answer: Keychain supports Hive and leading EVM chains, with supported testnets included and more networks coming over time.
faq.devices.question: Does Keychain work on mobile and browser extension?
faq.devices.answer: Yes. Keychain is available on mobile and browser extension, so you can access a familiar wallet experience across devices.
faq.connectivity.question: Can I connect Keychain to dApps?
faq.connectivity.answer: Yes. Keychain lets you connect to supported dApps and review actions before approving them.
faq.testnets.question: Does Keychain support testnets?
faq.testnets.answer: Yes. Testnet support is included for supported EVM ecosystems.
faq.expansion.question: Are more networks coming?
faq.expansion.answer: Yes. Keychain is expanding support over time as broader Web3 compatibility grows.

team.title: Meet the Team
testimonials.title: What People Are Saying
testimonials.asgarth.text: Hive Keychain is the best Hive wallet and the easiest way to interact with the Hive ecosystem both on desktop and mobile.
testimonials.starkerz.text: From secure blockchain signatures, payments, using their in wallet browser to get cash back on purchases & quickly signing up & adding account data to the blockchain for posting content with my BTC account, Hive Keychain is one of our recommended go to apps in the Hive ecosystem!
testimonials.howo.text: I use Keychain daily to interact with the chain! It's the best out there.
testimonials.vaultec.text: Keychain is the ultimate wallet interface for the Hive blockchain. We look forward  to working on bringing the world of cross-chain to Hive
testimonials.dan.text: I use Hive keychain everyday. I started using their mobile browser as well more and more, it makes hiving better. It does so much, and it just works. First step to hiving is downloading Hive keychain.
testimonials.yabapmatt.text: Hive Keychain is probably the most important tool in the entire Hive ecosystem. Hive is made to power web3 applications and Keychain is what allows users to easily and securely interact with those apps on both desktop and mobile. Without it, the user experience for Splinterlands and all Hive applications would be considerably worse and I don't think we would have had nearly the level of success that we have had.
testimonials.arcange.text: I've been using Hive Keychain for years now, and I can confidently say it’s one of the most secure and user-friendly tools in the blockchain space. The integration of the HiveAuth protocol was game-changer enabling the most secure and seamless way to authenticate and sign transactions on mobiles apps.  If you’re serious about blockchain and want a tool that’s both cutting-edge and rock-solid, Hive Keychain is the gold standard.
testimonials.arcange.role: Creator of HiveBuzz, HiveSQL, HiveAuth, Engage and more
